features.name: Minitab Worksheet (.mwx) Support
features.description: Lets users import and preview Minitab Worksheet files (.mwx) inside Datagrok, surfacing worksheet data as a table.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions share the 'mwx' extension token and together cover the full import + preview lifecycle for Minitab Worksheet files.

features.name: Minitab Project (.mpx) Support
features.description: Lets users import and preview Minitab Project files (.mpx), which may contain multiple worksheets and analysis outputs.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions share the 'mpx' extension token and together cover the full import + preview lifecycle for Minitab Project files.
